title: BABY PROMISE - 211info
text: MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL BABY PROMISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers full-day quality care and education for eligible children in local early care and education settings. 4510 NE 102nd Avenue Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: -Children ages 6 weeks to 3 years - Parents must live or work in Multnomah County, and be currently employed or attending school and be enrolled in or eligible for ERDC. Household income must be at or below 200% of the Federal Poverty Level -Placement in a Baby Promise slot is an exemption to the ERDC waitlist. Regional Baby Promise enrollment partners will collaborate with families and approved Baby Promise providers to identify the family’s needs and the regional Baby Promise slots available that meet those needs. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 491-6205 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 491-6205 CCRR [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address, proof of income, photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Infants/Toddlers Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - COMMUNITY CHILD CARE INITIATIVE PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD CARE RESOURCE AND REFERRAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
